'''japodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycolylation|mycolylation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycolylation|mycolylation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| japodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæpedeth|jæpedeth]] || [[word:jæpedej|jæpedej]] || [[word:jæpedesh|jæpedesh]] || [[word:jæpede|jæpede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:japopodoth|japopodoth]] || [[word:japopodoj|japopodoj]] || [[word:japopodosh|japopodosh]] || [[word:japopodo|japopodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:japodoth|japodoth]] || [[word:japodoj|japodoj]] || [[word:japodosh|japodosh]] || [[word:japodo|japodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:japofdoth|japofdoth]] || [[word:japofdoj|japofdoj]] || [[word:japofdosh|japofdosh]] || [[word:japofdof|japofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:japodotho|japodotho]] || [[word:japodojo|japodojo]] || [[word:japodosho|japodosho]] || [[word:japodoko|japodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:japodoth|japodoth]] || [[word:japodoj|japodoj]] || [[word:japodosh|japodosh]] || [[word:japodo|japodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:japodothol|japodothol]] || [[word:japodojol|japodojol]] || [[word:japodoshol|japodoshol]] || [[word:japodokol|japodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:japodothotho|japodothotho]] || [[word:japodojojo|japodojojo]] || [[word:japodoshosho|japodoshosho]] || [[word:japodoko|japodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:japodothon|japodothon]] || [[word:japodojon|japodojon]] || [[word:japodoshon|japodoshon]] || [[word:japodokon|japodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:japodothoro|japodothoro]] || [[word:japodojoro|japodojoro]] || [[word:japodoshoro|japodoshoro]] || [[word:japodokoro|japodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
